Worldwide Endorsement of the Special Procedure Communication
To Protect Our Ocean and Health
Addressed to the Office of the High Commissioner for Human Rights at the United Nations Office Geneva. Prepared by the Attorneys of Ocean Vision Legal, the Scientists of the Independent Expert Panel, and officially endorsed by organizations around the world herein.
